title: oxalis caucensis
intro: Oxalis caucensis, a plant species belonging to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae), is a type of flowering perennial native to Colombia and Venezuela. The medicinal properties of Oxalis caucensis have been used in traditional medicine, primarily due to its high content of oxalic acid and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Oxalis caucensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in some traditional medicine remedies.
